description: Fix all bugs, race conditions, and stability issues to make BU-CLI work 100% correctly

userStories.title: Fix zombie processes and status detection in process manager
userStories.description: As a developer, I need background server processes to be reaped properly so they don't become zombies and status checks work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a goroutine that calls cmd.Wait() after Start() to reap finished processes
ProcessState is correctly populated so status checks return 'Exited' when process dies
Crash detection in ToolStartServer works (checks if process exited within 1 second)
Replace bytes.Buffer with a thread-safe synchronized buffer to fix data race on stdout/stderr
userStories.notes: Added safeBuf type with mutex-protected Write/String. Added goroutine calling Wait() to reap processes. Added StopAll() for graceful shutdown. Status checks now use proc.isExited() instead of checking ProcessState directly.

userStories.title: Fix double-close panic race condition in project git detection
userStories.description: As a developer, I need fillGit() to be safe to call from multiple goroutines without panicking on double-close of the gitDone channel.
acceptanceCriteria: Use sync.Once to guard the close(c.gitDone) call so it can never double-close
fillGit() remains safe to call concurrently from Detect() and FillGitInfo()
userStories.notes: Replaced manual mutex + select pattern with sync.Once. Channel close is now guaranteed to happen exactly once regardless of concurrent calls.

userStories.title: Serialize concurrent tool permission prompts
userStories.description: As a user, I need permission prompts to appear one at a time so they don't interleave and corrupt the terminal when multiple tools run concurrently.
acceptanceCriteria: Permission checks are serialized with a mutex so only one prompt appears at a time
Non-permission-requiring tools still execute concurrently for speed
userStories.notes: Added permMu sync.Mutex to Agent struct. Permission prompts now lock the mutex before showing UI and unlock after user responds.

userStories.title: Fix duplicate localSet variable in models command
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the models command to not create a redundant localSet map that is populated but never read.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove the first localSet declaration inside the else block
Keep only one localSet used for both display and dedup
userStories.notes: Moved localSet declaration before the if/else block so it's populated during local model display and reused for cloud model dedup.

userStories.title: Fix history file naming and add graceful cleanup
userStories.description: As a user, I need the readline history file to have a proper name and for the CLI to clean up background processes on exit.
acceptanceCriteria: Background server processes are killed on REPL exit via cleanup in the exit path
userStories.notes: Renamed history file. Added tools.StopAll() call before exit to kill any remaining background server processes.
